code:
import io
import string

let haystack = match io.read_line() when Some(s) s when None "" end
let needle = match io.read_line() when Some(s) s when None "" end

mut count = 0
mut i = 0
let n = string.len(haystack)
let nb = match string.byte_at(needle, 0) when Some(b) b when None -1 end

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(haystack, i) when Some(x) x when None -1 end
  if b == nb
    count = count + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("count=#{count}")
